name: vf-agent-command-center
description: VF Agent Command Center — Valiant Firm multi-agent AI operating system

scripts.build: npm run build -w @vf/shared && npm run build -w @vf/api && npm run build -w @vf/desktop
scripts.build:api: npm run build -w @vf/shared && npm run build -w @vf/api
scripts.vercel-build: npm run build -w @vf/shared && npm run build -w @vf/api
